title: Enrollment and Degree Verification
content:
Enrollment and Degree Verification
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to request enrollment or degree verification.

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your First and Last Name.

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR CLASSIFICATION
Select your classification: Undergraduate or Graduate.

---

STEP 3: SELECT INFORMATION TO VERIFY
Choose what you need verified:
- Current semester enrollment
- Next semester enrollment (you must already be registered for the next semester)
- Previous semester enrollment
- All dates of attendance
- Attached document (upload a document that needs to be verified or stamped)
- Degree verification (if your degree has not yet been conferred, select enrollment verification instead)

---

STEP 4: UPLOAD DOCUMENTS (IF APPLICABLE)
If you selected "Attached document" in Step 3, upload the document. Requirements:
- The document must be signed.
- Text must be clear and legible.
- No background images.
- Page edges must be visible.
- PDF format is preferred.

---

STEP 5: SELECT NUMBER OF COPIES AND DELIVERY METHOD

Number of Copies: Select how many copies you need.

Delivery Method:
- Email: Enter "self" to receive it at your MSU email, or enter the recipient's email address.
- Fax: Enter the fax number with ATTENTION TO (the person or department it should go to).
- Mail: Enter the full mailing address.
- Pick up: Enter "self" if you will pick it up, or enter the full name and ID of the person picking it up on your behalf.

---

STEP 6: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes 1 to 3 business days. During peak periods or if the form needs to be sent to another department, processing may take up to 10 business days.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Enrollment Verification Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/17Zqw8TcJSDo-4ImteZGLGbxlGNfGdItR/view)
